name: New Relic
description: Monitor application performance, infrastructure health, and alert conditions via the New Relic REST API. Query metric timeslice data, track deployments, manage alert policies and conditions, and list applications and servers. Essential for agents that need to check system health, investigate performance issues, or automate observability workflows.

plans.name: Standard
plans.limits: 100 GB/month ingest, up to 5 full platform users

plans.name: Pro
plans.limits: Unlimited full platform users, commitment discounts

capabilities.name: list_applications
capabilities.description: List and filter APM applications by name, host, language, or health status. Returns performance summaries including response time, throughput, error rate, and Apdex score.

capabilities.name: get_metric_data
capabilities.description: Retrieve metric timeslice data for an application over a specified time range. Query metrics like Apdex, response time, throughput, and error rate with configurable granularity.

capabilities.name: record_deployment
capabilities.description: Record a deployment event for an application, including revision, changelog, description, and user. Useful for correlating performance changes with code releases.

capabilities.name: manage_alert_policies
capabilities.description: Create, list, update, and delete alert policies. Configure incident preferences to control how violations are grouped into incidents (per policy, per condition, or per target).

capabilities.name: list_alert_violations
capabilities.description: List current and recent alert violations and incidents across all policies. Filter by time range and status to identify active issues and their severity.
